title: Random Enchanted Rewards for AuraSkills
description: Adds enchanted item rewards on specified level-ups in AuraSkills. All items are randomly generated! Currently supporting Minecraft 1.20+
body:
The Random Enchanted Rewards Plugin is designed to enhance player progression by rewarding them with randomly enchanted items as they level up their skills using the AuraSkills (Aurelium Skills) system. This is currently running on Minecraft 1.21.
![Message in chat letting you know when you receive the rewards](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/9c7ffa815251c15aff5f55c2b52bbd543ef034f7.png)

Just Added:
Support for minecraft versions 1.20 - 1.21

# **Features:**
- Skill-Based Rewards: Players receive randomly enchanted items every set amount of levels they progress in any AuraSkill.![Some acquired items from the script](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/1b6879caad36c3015f6fafc9df0e4295b31c6c98.png)
> 1. Farming - Iron-Netherite Hoe
> 2. Mining - Iron-Netherite Pickaxe
> 3. Fishing - Fishing Rod
> 4. Excavation - Iron-Netherite Shovel
> 5. Foraging - Iron-Netherite Axe
> 6. Archery - Bow + Crossbow
> 7. Fighting - Iron-Netherite Sword
> 8. Defense - Iron-Netherite Helm, Body, Legs
> 9. Alchemy - Potion
> 10. Enchanting - Book
​
- Item Rarity System: The plugin features a weighted rarity system that determines the type of item players receive:
Higher chance for Iron and Gold items.
Lower chance for Diamond items.
Very rare chance for Netherite items.

![You can change every item weight to help even out distribution of rewards.](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/ba8c97d3926185ba7722c8b261c78d3e56af36d6.png)
​

- Configurable Options: Configure various aspects of the plugin, such as item rarity weights, maximum enchantments, and enchantment level increase chances through a config.yml file. 
![Change enchantments, lvl of enchantment, reward level, and if the skills give rewards](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/0cc7a52d32be8cda5983fd521fba09080f5e1c59.png)

- Easy Reload: Admins can reload the plugin configuration without restarting the server using the "/rer reload" command.
